description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the centos:latest Docker image. Add a before_script that executes `curl -sSfLk https://github.com/Keats/gutenberg/releases/download/v0.3.4/gutenberg-v0.3.4-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz | tar xz`. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs `./gutenberg build`, stores the `public/` directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
